Home / Services / Garage Door Spring Repair

Garage Door Spring Repair

Fast and reliable garage door spring repair services for all types of doors.

Garage door springs are under immense tension and are crucial for the safe and smooth operation of your door. When a spring breaks, it can cause the door to become unbalanced or even inoperable. Attempting to repair or replace springs yourself can be extremely dangerous. Our trained technicians at Expert Door LLC have the expertise and equipment to safely and efficiently handle spring repairs.

We carry a wide range of high-quality springs to match your specific door type and weight. We'll assess the damage, replace the broken spring with a durable replacement, and ensure the door is properly balanced and aligned. We understand the urgency of spring repairs, especially during Cleveland's harsh winters when a malfunctioning garage door can expose your home to the elements. We prioritize these calls to get your door back in working order quickly.

Whether you have torsion springs or extension springs, we have the knowledge and experience to get the job done right. We'll also inspect the other components of your garage door system to identify any potential issues before they become major problems. Trust Expert Door LLC for safe, reliable garage door spring repair services in Cleveland.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Safety Assessment – We prioritize safety and carefully assess the condition of the broken spring and the surrounding components.
  2. 02 Step 2: Spring Removal – Using specialized tools, we safely remove the damaged spring, ensuring no further damage to the door or hardware.
  3. 03 Step 3: Spring Replacement – We install a new, high-quality spring that matches the specifications of your door.
  4. 04 Step 4: Balance and Alignment – We meticulously balance the door and align it to ensure smooth and safe operation.

Benefits

  • Safe and reliable spring replacement
  • Proper door balance and alignment
  • Extended lifespan of your garage door
  • Reduced risk of future problems

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if my garage door spring is broken?

Common signs include a loud bang, a visible gap in the spring, or a garage door that is difficult or impossible to open.

Can I replace the garage door spring myself?

Replacing garage door springs is extremely dangerous and should only be performed by trained professionals. The springs are under high tension and can cause serious injury if mishandled.

How long does it take to replace a garage door spring?

In most cases, we can replace a garage door spring in under an hour. The exact time will depend on the type of spring and the complexity of the repair.
